zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk於大約1423年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾斯托克時，她的父親William Moleyns46歲，母親Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens43歲。她於1441年8月與John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1465年11月3日在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德享年43歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可維辛頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk于大约1423年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾斯托克时，她的父亲William Moleyns46岁，母亲Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens43岁。她于1441年8月与John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk在英国素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1465年11月3日在英国素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德享年43岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可維辛頓。

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk was born about 1423, in Stoke, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, William Moleyns, was 46 and her mother, Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens, was 43. She married John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk in August 1441, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 3 November 1465, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, at the age of 43, and was buried in Wissington, Suffolk, England.

fr.Stoke Newland, Suffolk, England, United: Stoke by Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk est née environ 1423, à Stoke, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, William Moleyns, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk en août 1441, à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 novembre 1465, à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Wissington, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.Stoke Newland, Suffolk, England, United: Stoke by Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk um 1423 in Stoke, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Moleyns 46 und ihre Mutter Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens 43. Sie hat im August 1441 in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. November 1465 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England und wurde in Wissington, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk è nata il circa 1423 nel Stoke, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, William Moleyns, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens, aveva 43 anni. Lei sposato John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk nel agosto 1441, nel Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 3 novembre 1465, nel Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Wissington, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolkが約1423年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアストクで生まれた時，父William Moleynsは46歳，母Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylensは43歳であった。1441年8月にイギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドでJohn Howard 1st Duke of Norfolkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1465年11月3日にイギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドで43歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクウィシントンにて埋葬された。

ko.Stoke Newland, Suffolk, England, United: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 이프스위치
ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk(이)가 대략 1423년 영국 벅잉함실르 스토크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Moleyns(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1441년 8월 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1465년 11월 3일 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 와이징턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk nasceu aproximadamente 1423, em Stoke, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Moleyns, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk em agosto de 1441, em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de novembro de 1465, em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Wissington, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.Stoke Newland, Suffolk, England, United: сток би ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk родилась около 1423 г. в местности сток, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Moleyns было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery B Whalesborough Barroness Moylens, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk август 1441 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 3 ноября 1465 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности виссингтон, суффолк, Англия.

Se casó con John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk en agosto de 1441, en Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 3 de noviembre de 1465, en Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Wissington, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
